zh.lifeSummary: 當Kunigunde von Baden於1265年出生時，她的父親Rudolf I von Baden38歲，母親Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN36歲。她於1281年12月20日之前與Friedrich VI. von Zollern結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她埋葬在德國海因里希_霍恩左勒奧拉赤 海格洛斯特特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Baden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: patronymic from   Bade  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably an adoption of the German surname (see 1 above).

English: habitational name from a place called Bayden in Sussex, which is referred to in 17th-century documents but unlocated (it is possibly to be identified with Bainden, a manor in Mayfield, Sussex), or from Baydon in Wiltshire. The latter is from Old English beg + dūn, meaning ‘berry hill’.

variants.name: Bade
meanings: English (North Yorkshire) and Scottish: probably from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Bad(d)a, which is perhaps a short form of various compound names with the first element beadu ‘battle’.
North German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed with badu ‘strife, battle’.
North German: occupational name from Middle Low German bade ‘messenger’.

en.lifeSummary: When Kunigunde von Baden was born in 1265, her father, Rudolf I von Baden, was 38 and her mother, Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, was 36. She married Friedrich VI. von Zollern before 20 December 1281. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She was buried in Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kunigunde von Baden est née en 1265, son père, Rudolf I von Baden, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich VI. von Zollern avant 20 décembre 1281. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elleenterrée à Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kunigunde von Baden 1265 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf I von Baden 38 und ihre Mutter Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN 36. Sie hat vor 20. Dezember 1281 Friedrich VI. von Zollern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie wurde in Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kunigunde von Baden è nata il nel 1265, sua padre, Rudolf I von Baden, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich VI. von Zollern prima del 20 dicembre 1281. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Fu sepolta a Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Kunigunde von Baden(이)가 1265년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf I von Baden(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1281년 12월 20일 이전 Friedrich VI. von Zollern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 독일 플레우ss 호헨졸레른 오베램트 하익를럭 스테텐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kunigunde von Baden nasceu em 1265, seu pai, Rudolf I von Baden, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich VI. von Zollern antes 20 de dezembro de 1281. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela foi sepultada em Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kunigunde von Baden родилась в 1265 г., её отцу по имени Rudolf I von Baden было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich VI. von Zollern перед 20 декабрь 1281 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она была похоронена в местности стеттен, обирамт хеигирлоч, хохензоллирн, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kunigunde von Baden nació en 1265, su papá, Rudolf I von Baden, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Kunigunde VON EBERSTEIN, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Friedrich VI. von Zollern antes de 20 de diciembre de 1281. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Fue sepultada en Stetten, Oberamt Haigerloch, Hohenzollern, Preußen, Alemania.
